version.label: Config version
version.description: The fkit kit version (matches package.json) this file was created/last regenerated under. Auto-updated on every bootstrap/sync. Not user-editable.

defaultModel.label: Default model
defaultModel.description: The fallback owner for any skill without its own override.

values.claude: Runs natively on Claude; every other model gets a stub that delegates to Claude.
values.codex: Runs natively on Codex; every other model gets a stub that delegates to Codex.

skills.label: Per-skill overrides
skills.description: Pins an individual skill to a specific model, ignoring defaultModel for that skill only. A skill not listed here follows defaultModel.

values.claude: Runs natively on Claude; every other model gets a stub that delegates to Claude.
values.codex: Runs natively on Codex; every other model gets a stub that delegates to Codex.
